reviews.comment:
Otra buena muestra de las buenas condiciones que siempre ofrecen los concesionarios del ACA.
Solamente un detalle objetable, la pequeña capacidad de estacionamiento cuando se quiere permanecer en las instalaciones para un descanso ya sea en el full o sanitarios, que se siente sobre todo en las fechas de recambio de quincenas.

(Translated by Google)
Another good example of the excellent conditions that ACA dealerships consistently offer.
Only one minor drawback is the limited parking capacity when you want to stay on the premises for a break, whether in the service area or the restrooms, which is especially noticeable during peak pay periods.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16093166206795082767/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURzOEptYVVBEAE

reviews.comment:
Agradable.. ojo  los playeros te cambian la serviclub por una usada.   Tenia   muchos puntos me dieron una que no funcionaba

(Translated by Google)
Nice... but be aware that the attendants will exchange your Serviclub card for a used one. I had a lot of points, but they gave me one that didn't work.
